name: Fairway Accuracy

setup.description: Mark a 20-yard-wide zone 150-170 yards out. Hit 10 iron shots aiming to land inside it.

rules.description: Play 3 rounds of 10 shots at the marked zone — record your best round of the 3. Distance doesn't matter here — only whether the ball lands inside the width markers.
scoring: 1 point per ball landing inside the zone
Play 3 rounds; record your best round of the 3

caption: Forget the pin — today it's about the width of the miss. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
